case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 90-210s currencyservice metrics. Latency.p50 dev=+1.7 persists across windows with workload increase. Trace latency.p99 dev=+3.3 confirms internal latency as root cause. Ranking updates currencyservice_latency to top1.
Currencyservice latency.p50 dev=+1.7 drives root cause. Trace latency.p99 dev=+3.3 confirms internal latency. Checkoutservice and recommendationservice show secondary anomalies.
